title: Complete a POS sale and access the generated invoice from sales history
description: Verifies a cashier can complete checkout and then find and open the resulting invoice in sales history.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the POS interface
Select at least one product for the sale
Change the selected product quantity to a valid number greater than 1
Choose a payment method
Enter a valid payment amount that covers the total
Complete the sale
Click the navigation link to sales history
Open the most recent invoice from the list
Verify invoice details are displayed

title: Sign in to reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in and is taken to the dashboard upon successful login.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Add a new product and see it listed in inventory
description: Verifies a manager can create a product and the new product appears in the inventory list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to inventory management
Initiate adding a new product
Fill Product A name into the product name field
Fill valid values into required product fields
Submit the product form
Verify the new product appears in the inventory list

title: Browse invoices and filter sales history
description: Verifies a user can view the default invoice list in Sales and refine it using date or search filters, resulting in an updated filtered list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open Sales invoices
Fill a query into the invoice search field
Select a valid date range filter for invoices
Verify the invoice list updates to reflect the applied filters

title: Register a new account and land on the dashboard
description: Verifies a new user can register successfully and is taken to the dashboard after registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a unique valid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill required registration details with valid values
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Open an invoice to review details and line items
description: Verifies a user can open an invoice from the Sales list and view its detailed information including line items.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open Sales invoices
Click an invoice in the list to open its details
Verify invoice details are displayed
Verify invoice line items are displayed

title: Browse sales invoices, filter, and open an invoice for details
description: Verifies an owner can view the sales list, apply filters, and open an invoice to see its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the POS interface
Select at least one product for the sale
Choose a payment method
Enter a valid payment amount that covers the total
Complete the sale
Click the navigation link to sales history
Wait for the invoice list to load
Apply a date filter using a valid date range
Apply a search filter using a valid query
Open an invoice from the filtered list
Verify invoice details are displayed

title: Edit an existing product and see updates reflected in the list
description: Verifies a manager can update an existing product and the inventory list reflects the saved changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to inventory management
Initiate adding a new product
Fill Product To Edit name into the product name field
Fill valid values into required product fields
Submit the product form
Open the product details for Product To Edit from the list
Update the product name field to Product Edited
Save changes
Verify the inventory list shows the updated product information

title: Manager adds a product and sells it in POS
description: Verifies a product created in inventory is available for selection in POS and can be sold successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to inventory management
Initiate adding a new product
Fill Cross Module Product name into the product name field
Fill valid values into required product fields
Submit the product form
Click the navigation link to the POS interface
Search for Cross Module Product in the product picker
Select Cross Module Product for the sale
Choose a payment method
Enter a valid payment amount that covers the total
Complete the sale
Verify a sale completion confirmation is visible

title: Open invoice details after filtering the list
description: Verifies that a user can filter the Sales list and still open an invoice from the filtered results to inspect its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open Sales invoices
Fill a query into the invoice search field
Click an invoice in the filtered list to open its details
Verify invoice details are displayed

title: Clear filters returns to the unfiltered invoice list
description: Verifies a user can clear previously applied Sales filters and return to the default invoice list view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open Sales invoices
Fill a query into the invoice search field
Select a valid date range filter for invoices
Clear all applied filters
Verify the invoice list returns to the default unfiltered view

title: POS blocks invalid quantity from being applied
description: Verifies entering an invalid quantity (such as a negative number) shows validation and prevents completing the sale.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the POS interface
Select at least one product for the sale
Attempt to set the selected product quantity to an invalid negative number
Attempt to proceed to complete the sale
Verify a quantity validation error is visible
Verify the sale is not completed

title: Product required-field validation blocks creation
description: Verifies missing required product details show inline validation and prevent creating a product.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to inventory management
Initiate adding a new product
Fill Product Missing Field name into the product name field
Leave at least one required product field empty
Submit the product form
Verify an inline validation error is visible
Verify the product is not added to the inventory list

title: Sales page handles no filter results gracefully
description: Verifies that applying filters that yield no matches shows an appropriate empty state without breaking the Sales page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open Sales invoices
Fill an unlikely query into the invoice search field that should return no matches
Verify an empty state is displayed for the invoice list

title: Registration required-field validation blocks submission
description: Verifies submitting registration with a missing required field shows an inline validation error and does not proceed to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a unique valid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Leave at least one required registration field empty
Submit the registration form
Verify an inline validation error is visible
Verify the user does not land on the dashboard
